name: P-Search: Hungarian SME Grant Scraper & RAG Ingestion (v2)

nodes.name: Daily Schedule (02:00)
nodes.notes: Naponta 02:00-kor fut le. Magyar KKV palyazatok es hitelek begyujtese.

nodes.name: Fetch Hungarian Grants (Palyazatfigyelo API)
nodes.notes: Lekeri az aktiv KKV palyazatokat. Tablak: title/cim/name, description/leiras, amount_min, amount_max, deadline, provider/kiiro, source_url, eligibility_criteria.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title || $json.cim || $json.name, description: $json.description || $json.leiras || $json.summary, provider: $json.provider || $json.kiiro || $json.agency || 'Magyar Kormany', grant_type: $json.grant_type || $json.tipus || 'palyazat', amount_min: Number($json.amount_min || $json.min_tamogatas || $json.min_funding || 0), amount_max: Number($json.amount_max || $json.max_tamogatas || $json.max_funding || 0), deadline: $json.deadline || $json.beadasi_hatar || $json.close_date || null, eligibility_criteria: $json.eligibility_criteria || $json.jogosultsagi_feltetelek || $json.criteria || null, source_url: $json.source_url || $json.url || $json.link || null }) }}

nodes.name: Ingest to Supabase RAG (ingest-n8n-grants)
nodes.notes: POST a Supabase ingest-n8n-grants Edge Function-nek. A function Gemini embeddinget general es RAG adatbazisba menti. Auth: N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
